## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly checkpoint on automation initiatives, focusing on SEO strategy and content development for voice agent topics.](https://fathom.video/share/jaLBEyPE_ViEU_Qxk4hNiMXnhftuUYme?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [AI apps category pages are experiencing technical issues, potentially impacting organic traffic](https://fathom.video/share/jaLBEyPE_ViEU_Qxk4hNiMXnhftuUYme?tab=summary&timestamp=146.0)
  - [New content strategy focuses on developing "helper clusters" for voice agent topics across industries, use cases, and business types](https://fathom.video/share/jaLBEyPE_ViEU_Qxk4hNiMXnhftuUYme?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)
  - [Voice agent-related pages are showing promising engagement, suggesting opportunities for targeted outreach and lead generation](https://fathom.video/share/jaLBEyPE_ViEU_Qxk4hNiMXnhftuUYme?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)
  - [Content creation challenges include lack of existing knowledge base, requiring a prescriptive approach to page structure and adaptation](https://fathom.video/share/jaLBEyPE_ViEU_Qxk4hNiMXnhftuUYme?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)

## Topics

### SEO Issues and Opportunities

  - [AI apps category pages not working, causing a server issue and potential 5% drop in organic traffic](https://fathom.video/share/jaLBEyPE_ViEU_Qxk4hNiMXnhftuUYme?tab=summary&timestamp=164.0)
  - [High ranking for "AI voice agents" keyword, particularly on the glossary page](https://fathom.video/share/jaLBEyPE_ViEU_Qxk4hNiMXnhftuUYme?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)
  - [Opportunity to optimize high-performing pages with strong CTAs and lead generation tactics](https://fathom.video/share/jaLBEyPE_ViEU_Qxk4hNiMXnhftuUYme?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)

### Content Strategy Development

  - [Created helper clusters focusing on industries, use cases, and business types for voice agent applications](https://fathom.video/share/jaLBEyPE_ViEU_Qxk4hNiMXnhftuUYme?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)
  - [Aim to cover a wide range of specific topics, even with potentially low search volume, to establish comprehensive coverage](https://fathom.video/share/jaLBEyPE_ViEU_Qxk4hNiMXnhftuUYme?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)
  - [Need to filter and refine topics to ensure relevance and avoid overly niche areas](https://fathom.video/share/jaLBEyPE_ViEU_Qxk4hNiMXnhftuUYme?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)
  - [Considering development of function-specific content (e.g., sales, operations, legal) combined with KPIs or metrics](https://fathom.video/share/jaLBEyPE_ViEU_Qxk4hNiMXnhftuUYme?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

### Lead Generation and Outreach

  - [Identified \~1,200 accounts showing interest in voice agent topics](https://fathom.video/share/jaLBEyPE_ViEU_Qxk4hNiMXnhftuUYme?tab=summary&timestamp=1111.0)
  - [Current process: Signals go to Salesforce, then to outreach sequences for targeted communication](https://fathom.video/share/jaLBEyPE_ViEU_Qxk4hNiMXnhftuUYme?tab=summary&timestamp=1285.0)
  - [Opportunity to improve analytics on outreach effectiveness to inform content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/jaLBEyPE_ViEU_Qxk4hNiMXnhftuUYme?tab=summary&timestamp=1297.0)
  - [Exploring use of Clay's tool to automate prospect identification and outreach for interested accounts](https://fathom.video/share/jaLBEyPE_ViEU_Qxk4hNiMXnhftuUYme?tab=summary&timestamp=1568.0)

### Content Creation Challenges

  - [Lack of existing knowledge base for many voice agent topics](https://fathom.video/share/jaLBEyPE_ViEU_Qxk4hNiMXnhftuUYme?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [Need for a prescriptive approach to page structure and content](https://fathom.video/share/jaLBEyPE_ViEU_Qxk4hNiMXnhftuUYme?tab=summary&timestamp=1783.0)
  - [Plan to develop a template for one cluster, then adapt it across other topics](https://fathom.video/share/jaLBEyPE_ViEU_Qxk4hNiMXnhftuUYme?tab=summary&timestamp=1798.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Alexa to discuss updating the voice agent glossary page with Jose, focusing on CTAs and content refresh](https://fathom.video/share/jaLBEyPE_ViEU_Qxk4hNiMXnhftuUYme?tab=summary&timestamp=986.0)
  - [Marcel to share initial content template and Airtable with the team](https://fathom.video/share/jaLBEyPE_ViEU_Qxk4hNiMXnhftuUYme?tab=summary&timestamp=1842.0)
  - [Alexa to sync with Peter next week on content development strategy](https://fathom.video/share/jaLBEyPE_ViEU_Qxk4hNiMXnhftuUYme?tab=summary&timestamp=1816.0)
  - [Investigate and resolve AI apps category page technical issues](https://fathom.video/share/jaLBEyPE_ViEU_Qxk4hNiMXnhftuUYme?tab=summary&timestamp=146.0)
  - [Explore implementation of Clay's tool for automated prospect identification and outreach](https://fathom.video/share/jaLBEyPE_ViEU_Qxk4hNiMXnhftuUYme?tab=summary&timestamp=1568.0)
  - [Review and potentially update the content performance report to identify high-converting topics](https://fathom.video/share/jaLBEyPE_ViEU_Qxk4hNiMXnhftuUYme?tab=summary&timestamp=1427.0)
